summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Financial Dashboard and Player Sessions features. All backend APIs (55/55) and frontend components working perfectly with real seeded data (1200 financial transactions, 120 player sessions).
passed_tests: Financial Dashboard page loads at /financial with all summary cards
Financial Dashboard displays Hourly Revenue, Revenue by Site, and Top Games charts
Financial Dashboard Transaction Ledger with type filtering
Backend /api/financial endpoints return proper data with filtering
Backend /api/financial/summary returns aggregated totals
Backend /api/financial/charts returns chart data
Player Sessions page loads at /players with summary cards
Player Sessions displays timeline, duration, and game popularity charts
Player Sessions Top Players leaderboard with tier badges working
Player Sessions list with status filtering
Session detail drawer opens with full session info and financials
Backend /api/players/sessions returns sessions with filtering
Backend /api/players/summary returns player statistics
Backend /api/players/charts returns chart data including leaderboard
Both Financial and Player Sessions appear in sidebar navigation
All 1200 seeded financial transactions displaying correctly
All 120 seeded player sessions across 50 players working
Tier system (Diamond/Platinum/Gold/Silver/Bronze) functioning
Authentication and session management working
All interactive filters and dropdowns functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (55/55 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all components and interactions working)
